description_long: This is a rectangular, double-compartment wall-mounted shelf or cabinet frame, constructed primarily from a dark, metallic material. The structure features two large open sections divided by a central vertical support, with no visible doors, handles, or backing panels. The frame is thin and sleek, with a uniform border thickness and clean, sharp edges, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The open design suggests it is intended for display or storage of items, possibly in a garage, workshop, or urban public space. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and the color is a consistent dark gray or black. There are no visible contents, glass panels, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A modern, rectangular, double-compartment wall-mounted shelf or cabinet frame made of dark metal with a minimalist, open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame with two open compartments divided by a central vertical support.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the frame and the absence of depth or backing panels.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the open compartments and central divider.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim, flat profile of the frame.
